query:
SELECT
    s.station_cd,
    l.average_distance,
            (
              6371 * acos(
                cos(
                  radians(s.lat)
                ) * cos(
                  radians($1)
                ) * cos(
                  radians($2) - radians(s.lon)
                ) + sin(
                  radians(s.lat)
                ) * sin(
                  radians($3)
                )
              )
            ) AS distance
          FROM stations AS s
          JOIN lines AS l ON l.line_cd = $4
          WHERE
            s.line_cd = $5
            AND s.e_status = 0
          ORDER BY 
            distance
          LIMIT 
            1
